notes: RTH preset, default 10% equity sizing. Requested NASDAQ:AAPL resolved to BATS:AAPL. n=234 >= 100 (sufficient). WR 42.74% misses the 45% branch; PF 0.89 misses both the 1.3 and 1.6 PF thresholds, so both criteria branches fail. maxDD 0.72% well under 15% cap. Long side alone was marginally profitable (PF 1.05, 127 trades) but short side was strongly negative (PF 0.72, 107 trades), dragging the combined result to fail. Spot-checked first 20 trades via data_get_trades: no outlier/single-trade distortion, losses and wins are of comparable, modest magnitude.
